TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Sakul_malaliki, title = Sakul_malaliki, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sakul_malaliki} }

S.FORM: u niyadu' nu Sakul malaliki. kakiliman nacila a labi misalukyaw atu minanam tu nutuas a dadiw kami i putah nu adidian a cacudadan,yu pisalakyawan nu inanay ,minanam kaku tu lukyaw atu dadiw,mudadiway i nacila a ina,minanam kaku mutuktuk, mikihatya kaku mutuktuk kya a matimen ,anuayaw anika laliki maydih kaku miladay mudadiw atu mukelid tu inanay.
S.PHON: u nijaduʔ~ʡ nu sakur~ɾ mar~ɾar~ɾiki. kakir~ɾiman naʦir~ɾa a r~ɾabi misar~ɾukjaw atu minanam tu nutuas a dadiw kami i putaħ nu adidian a ʦaʦudadan,ju pisar~ɾakjawan nu inanaj ,minanam kaku tu r~ɾukjaw atu dadiw,mudadiwaj i naʦir~ɾa a ina,minanam kaku mutuktuk, mikiħatja kaku mutuktuk kja a matimən ,anuajaw anika r~ɾar~ɾiki majdiħ kaku mir~ɾadaj mudadiw atu mukər~ɾid tu inanaj.
S.FORM: u niyadu' nu Sakul malaliki. kakiliman nacila a labi misalukyaw atu minanam tu nutuas a dadiw kami i putah nu adidian a cacudadan,yu pisalakyawan nu inanay ,minanam kaku tu lukyaw atu dadiw,mudadiway i nacila a ina,minanam kaku mutuktuk, mikihatya kaku mutuktuk kya a matimen ,anuayaw anika laliki maydih kaku miladay mudadiw atu mukelid tu inanay.
S.PHON: u nijaduʔ~ʡ nu sakur~ɾ mar~ɾar~ɾiki. kakir~ɾiman naʦir~ɾa a r~ɾabi misar~ɾukjaw atu minanam tu nutuas a dadiw kami i putaħ nu adidian a ʦaʦudadan,ju pisar~ɾakjawan nu inanaj ,minanam kaku tu r~ɾukjaw atu dadiw,mudadiwaj i naʦir~ɾa a ina,minanam kaku mutuktuk, mikiħatja kaku mutuktuk kja a matimən ,anuajaw anika r~ɾar~ɾiki majdiħ kaku mir~ɾadaj mudadiw atu mukər~ɾid tu inanaj.
